To configure meta tags for your media at: To configure meta tags for your media attachment pages, you need to first %s to parent.

Enter post IDs of posts you want to excl: Enter post IDs of posts you want to exclude from the sitemap, separated by commas. This option **applies** to all posts types including posts, pages, and custom post types.
Include the Featured Image too, even if: Include the Featured Image too, even if it does not appear directly in the post content.
Include reference to images from the pos: Include reference to images from the post content in sitemaps. This helps search engines index the important images on your pages.

Add user IDs, separated by commas, to ex: Add user IDs, separated by commas, to exclude them from the sitemap.
